hooks.command:
jq -r '.tool_input.command' | { read -r cmd; msg=$(echo "$cmd" | sed -n "s/.*-m ['"']\([^'"']*\)['"'].*/\1/p"); [ -z "$msg" ] && exit 0; echo "$msg" | grep -qE '^(feat|fix|docs|style|refactor|perf|test|chore|build|ci|revert)(\(.+\))?: .+' || printf '{"continue":false,"stopReason":"Commit rechazado. Usa Conventional Commits.
Ejemplos validos:
  feat: add login page
  fix(auth): resolve token expiry
  test: add playwright specs
  chore: update dependencies"}'; }
jq -r '.tool_input.file_path // .tool_response.filePath // ""' | { read -r f; echo "$f" | grep -qE '\.(spec|test)\.(ts|js|py)$' && npx playwright test "$f" --reporter=line 2>/dev/null || true; }
